---
title: "Information Theory"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "*.qmd"
    - "*.ipynb"
    - "!index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

## Information Theory

Notes, explorations, and experiments related to information theory, entropy, coding, and the mathematics of communication and knowledge.

### Topics to explore:

- Shannon entropy and mutual information
- Information geometry
- Predictive coding and the Free Energy Principle
- Information flow in complex systems
- Compression and representation learning
- Information-theoretic approaches to consciousness

---

::: {#listing}
:::
